name: Duotone Kiteboarding
meta_description: Shop the full Duotone Kiteboarding range — kites, bars, boards & accessories. Free EU shipping from €99. Shop now at Surf Store.
description_html:
About Duotone Kiteboarding

Duotone Kiteboarding is one of the world's most respected kite brands, born from decades of innovation in wind-powered water sports. Built on the legacy of North Kiteboarding and relaunched in 2018, Duotone combines aerospace-grade materials with athlete-driven design to produce kites, bars, and boards that perform at every level — from first timers to World Tour professionals.

Every Duotone kite is engineered at the brand's headquarters in Boards & More in Molln, Austria, where the R&D team works directly with their championship-winning team riders including Jesse Richman, Moona Whyte, and Airton Cozzolino. The result is gear that translates real-world feedback into tangible performance gains for everyday riders.

The Duotone Kiteboarding Range

Duotone's kite lineup covers every riding style. The Evo is the brand's legendary all-around kite — a favourite for freeriders who want one kite that does everything well. The Rebel is a sheet-and-go power machine built for wave and light-wind riding, while the Dice delivers playful, unhooked freestyle performance. For foil enthusiasts, the Echo and Juice offer ultra-light build and instant relaunch for downwind and foil sessions.

Duotone's bar system — the industry-standard Click Bar — is renowned for its one-click safety release and adjustable depower. It's compatible across the full kite range and works in concert with the 4-line and 5-line configurations available at every level.

Why Buy Duotone at Surf Store

Surf Store has been an authorised Duotone dealer since the brand's relaunch, which means you get full manufacturer warranty, expert pre-delivery inspection, and access to our in-store team who ride Duotone gear themselves. We stock the complete 2026 collection including D/LAB and SLS performance editions not widely available across Europe.

We offer free shipping on Duotone orders over €99 within the EU, and our specialists can advise on size selection based on your weight, location, and riding ambitions. Whether you're buying your first trainer kite or upgrading to a full D/LAB setup, Surf Store is your Duotone partner.

Expert Advice

Not sure which Duotone kite is right for you? Our team has tested the entire 2026 range in real conditions. Book a free consultation via WhatsApp or visit our store in Maribor, Slovenia. We'll match you with the right kite, bar, and board combination from day one.

Q: Which Duotone kite is best for beginners?
A: The Duotone Juice is specifically designed for progression, offering forgiving handling and stable power delivery that builds confidence without limiting your development.

Q: Can I use a Duotone kite with a non-Duotone bar?
A: While technically possible, we always recommend the Duotone Click Bar for the best safety performance and warranty coverage on your kite.

Q: Does Surf Store stock spare Duotone parts?
A: Yes — we carry the full range of Duotone spare parts including bladders, bridle lines, leading edge and strut replacements for current and recent model years.

name: Duotone Windsurfing
meta_description: Duotone windsurfing sails, masts, booms & boards. Race-proven tech for all levels. Free EU shipping €99+. Shop now at Surf Store.
description_html:
About Duotone Windsurfing

Duotone Windsurfing carries the heritage of North Sails Windsurfing, one of the most storied names in windsurf racing. After rebranding in 2019, Duotone has continued to dominate the PWA World Tour, with riders like Antoine Albeau and Sara Wennekes flying Duotone sails at the top of the podium. The brand's technical philosophy — light construction, fast delivery of power, and intuitive balance — makes Duotone sails accessible to club racers and wave sailors alike.

Manufactured in the Boards & More facility in Austria, Duotone windsurf sails feature proprietary technologies including SLS (Stiff Lite Skin) carbon laminate and D/LAB premium construction — the same specifications used by World Tour riders in competition.

The Duotone Windsurf Range

The Super_Star SLS is the benchmark slalom sail, designed for maximum speed in flat-water racing. The Warp_Foil is optimised for windsurf foiling, offering early liftoff and precise upwind angle. For wave sailing, the Tonic and Idol deliver lightweight, reactive handling in cross-shore and onshore conditions. Entry-level riders will find the Super_Hero an ideal platform for learning to plane consistently and build confidence.

Why Buy Duotone Windsurfing at Surf Store

As an authorised Duotone dealer, Surf Store stocks the full 2026 windsurf collection including sails, masts, booms, and complete sets. Our staff are active windsurfers who can advise on sail size for your local conditions, mast compatibility, and boom length. We offer a full rigging check service for customers who purchase complete setups from us.

Expert Advice

Choosing the right Duotone sail size depends on your weight, local wind range, and riding style. Contact our team for a personalised recommendation — we typically respond on WhatsApp within 10 minutes on working days.

Q: What mast works with Duotone sails?
A: Duotone recommends their own SDM or RDM masts for optimal sail profile. We stock the full Duotone mast range in-store.

Q: Are 2026 Duotone sails compatible with older booms?
A: Yes, if your boom has a standard front end. We recommend checking boom length range against your sail size.

Q: Does Surf Store offer windsurf package deals?
A: Absolutely — we regularly assemble complete sail, mast, boom, and extension packages at a discounted bundle price.

name: Duotone Wing Foiling
meta_description: Duotone wing foiling — wings, boards, foils & gear. Europe's best wing foil selection. Free EU shipping €99+. Shop now.
meta_keywords: duotone wing foil,duotone wings,duotone wing surf
description_html:
About Duotone Wing Foiling

Duotone entered wing foiling at the ground level when the sport was still being defined, and has since become the benchmark brand in the category. Collaborating with athletes like Balz Müller and Maxime Chabloz, Duotone's wing team has shaped how modern wings are designed — prioritising low-end power, stiffness-to-weight ratio, and handles that give precise control at high speed.

The Duotone wing range is manufactured with the same Boards & More production quality that defines their kite and windsurf products, with SLS carbon construction available across the premium tier.

The Duotone Wing Range

The Unit D/LAB is Duotone's flagship wing — a stiff, high-aspect design built for speed foiling and pumping. The Echo is the all-around choice: easy to relaunch, excellent upwind, and light enough for extended sessions. The Slick is the entry-level option that gives beginners confidence without compromising on quality. For downwinders, the Downwinder Air inflatable SUP boards pair perfectly with any unit wing.

Why Buy Duotone Wings at Surf Store

Surf Store stocks the complete 2026 Duotone wing range and the supporting foil, board, and wetsuit ecosystem. Our team can set up complete wing foil packages from board to foil to wing, sized appropriately for your weight and local wind conditions. We offer demo days at select locations — contact us to check availability.

Expert Advice

Wing foiling has the steepest learning curve of any board sport but the right starting setup makes an enormous difference. We recommend the Duotone Echo 5.0–6.0m combined with a stable foil board and a low-aspect front wing for beginners.

Q: What size wing for a 80kg beginner?
A: A 5.5–6.0m wing gives you enough power in 12–20 knots without being overwhelming. The Duotone Echo is ideal.

Q: Can I use a Duotone wing with another brand's foil?
A: Yes — wings are universal. However, foil compatibility with boards requires checking mast box type.

Q: Does Surf Store do wing foil lessons?
A: We can connect you with certified instructors in Slovenia. Contact us via WhatsApp for referrals.

name: Duotone SUP Boards & Paddles 2026
meta_description: Duotone inflatable SUP boards, paddles & packages 2026. Quality iSUPs for all levels. Free EU shipping €99+. Shop now.
meta_keywords: duotone sup,duotone isup,duotone inflatable sup board
description_html:
About Duotone SUP

Duotone SUP brings the same engineering discipline that defines the brand's kite and wing products to the stand-up paddleboarding world. Built for flat-water cruising, downwind runs, and river surfing, Duotone iSUPs feature drop-stitch construction with rigid rails, military-grade PVC, and pre-installed fin systems that rival hardboards in stiffness and tracking.

The Duotone SUP lineup is particularly well regarded for family and all-round use — boards like the Ride Air and Glide Air offer stability for first-time paddlers while remaining light enough for experienced riders to explore coastal touring routes.

The Duotone SUP Range

The Flow Air SLS is the brand's flagship all-around board — 10'6" wide and stable enough for paddlers of all sizes. The Raven Air SLS is a touring shape that tracks straight and covers distance efficiently. For families, the Grace Air SLS package includes a quality three-piece paddle, pump, bag, and leash at an exceptional value. Racing riders will find the Blitz Air SLS narrow profile responsive and fast.

Why Buy Duotone SUP at Surf Store

Surf Store is an authorised Duotone SUP dealer stocking boards, paddles, and complete iSUP packages. We provide full warranty support and can advise on board selection based on paddler weight, intended use, and local water conditions. iSUP boards ship deflated in their carry bag for easy EU delivery.

Expert Advice

For most adult paddlers, a 10'–10'6" all-round board at 30–33" wide is the ideal starting point. Surf Store's team can match you with the right Duotone model for your height, weight, and intended use.

Q: Are Duotone SUPs suitable for beginners?
A: Yes — the wide, stable shapes in the Air SLS range are specifically designed for first-time paddlers.

Q: Can Duotone iSUPs be used in the sea?
A: Absolutely. The drop-stitch PVC construction handles coastal chop well. Avoid rocky landings.

Q: What's included in a Duotone iSUP package?
A: Packages include the board, 3-piece adjustable paddle, dual-action pump, carry bag, ankle leash, and fin.

name: Cabrinha Kites & Kiteboards 2026
meta_description: Shop Cabrinha kites, boards & bars 2026. One of kitesurfing's most trusted brands. Free EU shipping €99+. Shop now.
description_html:
About Cabrinha

Founded in Maui in 2000 by big-wave surfer Pete Cabrinha, Cabrinha is one of the founding brands of modern kiteboarding. Pete's surfing roots are embedded in every Cabrinha product — from the wave-focused Moto kite to the performance twin-tip boards designed for powered freeriding. Cabrinha designs kites that feel alive and connected, drawing on the brand's deep culture of Hawaiian ocean riding.

Cabrinha kites are built at the brand's facility in Maui and feature proprietary technologies including Delta-Hybrid Arc geometry for consistent power and the Switchblade platform that has been the world's best-selling kite for over a decade.

The Cabrinha Range

The Switchblade remains Cabrinha's most versatile model — a delta-hybrid that bridges the gap between C-kite control and bow kite depower. The Drifter is the wave-specific kite that Cabrinha built for surf-style riding with minimal bar pressure. The FX delivers unhooked freestyle performance with a stiff, connected feel. The Moto X is the all-around SLE kite for progressive freeriders looking for maximum boost.

Why Buy Cabrinha at Surf Store

Surf Store stocks the full Cabrinha 2026 season lineup — kites from 4m to 18m, bars, boards, pads, straps, and accessories. As an authorised Cabrinha dealer, we provide full manufacturer warranty and our team rides Cabrinha gear in real conditions so we can give honest, first-hand advice.

Expert Advice

Choosing your first Cabrinha kite is one of the most important decisions in your kiteboarding journey. Our team recommends the Switchblade for versatility, the Drifter for wave riders, and the Moto for beginners who want long-term progression.

Q: Which Cabrinha kite is best for beginners?
A: The Cabrinha Moto is forgiving, stable, and offers excellent depower — perfect for learning.

Q: Is the Cabrinha Unify bar compatible with all Cabrinha kites?
A: Yes — the Unify Control System is designed for the full 2026 Cabrinha kite range.

Q: Does Surf Store stock Cabrinha accessories?
A: We stock the full range including leashes, pumps, bags, pads and straps, and spare parts.

name: NeilPryde Sails & Wetsuits 2026

description_html:
About NeilPryde

NeilPryde is one of the most storied names in sailing and water sports, founded in Hong Kong in 1970 by Neil Pryde, a world-record holder in sail manufacturing. The brand's legacy spans Olympic sailing, Americas Cup yacht sails, and windsurfing — and today NeilPryde is one of the key innovation forces in windsurf technology and wet suit design.

NeilPryde's windsurfing range is produced using proprietary X-Ply laminate technology and partnered with Severne and Gaastra in a production group that ensures consistent, race-ready quality across their lineup.

The NeilPryde Range

The Wizard wetsuit series is NeilPryde's flagship neoprene product — offering GBS seam construction, liquid-seal cuffs, and a 3D pre-shaped knee that eliminates restriction during footstrap use. Their windsurf sails span racing models like the RS:Flight to all-around freeride options including the Fusion and Atlas series. NeilPryde masts and booms round out a complete equipment ecosystem.

Why Buy NeilPryde at Surf Store

Surf Store has been a NeilPryde dealer for over a decade, stocking the full range of sails, masts, booms, extensions, foils, and wetsuits. Our windsurf experts can help you match sail size to your mast, boom length to your body, and wetsuit thickness to your local water temperature.

Expert Advice

NeilPryde's mid-range sails like the Atlas Pro offer exceptional value for club racers who want race-inspired performance at a realistic price. Contact our team for a complete NeilPryde rig package recommendation.

Q: Are NeilPryde sails compatible with other brands' masts?
A: NeilPryde sails are designed around their own mast bend curves but will work with IMCS-rated masts from other brands at the correct percentage.

Q: How thick a NeilPryde wetsuit for winter use?
A: For water temperatures 10–14°C, we recommend the Wizard 5/4mm with hood.

Q: Does Surf Store carry NeilPryde foils?
A: Yes — we stock the NeilPryde Glide windsurf foil range including masts, fuselages, and wing sets.

name: JP Australia SUP & Windsurf Boards 2026

description_html:
About JP Australia

JP Australia was founded by Jason Polakow — a six-time PWA Wave World Champion — and the brand carries his commitment to performance shapes into every board they produce. Based in Austria, JP Australia manufactures windsurf boards, SUP boards, wing foil boards, and kayaks with an emphasis on responsive rails, precise volume distribution, and durable construction.

JP Australia boards are renowned for their wave shapes — the Thruster and Quad series are among the most widely ridden wave boards on the PWA World Tour. Their SUP lineup delivers the same shape precision to stand-up paddleboarding.

The JP Australia Range

The Super Ride is JP's best-selling all-round windsurf board — wide, stable, and early-planing. The Freestyle Wave bridges freeriding and wave riding for versatile performance. The Slalom board series is the product of direct collaboration with PWA racers and targets maximum speed on flat water. For SUP, the WildWater Air is a high-performance river SUP while the AllRound Air excels as an everyday flat-water board.

Why Buy JP Australia at Surf Store

Surf Store stocks the JP Australia range across windsurf and SUP categories. We can advise on volume and width selection for your weight, style, and local conditions, and have firsthand experience with many models in the Adriatic and Slovenian wind spots.

Expert Advice

For windsurf beginners, we recommend starting with a wide, high-volume JP Super Ride or Freestyle Wave, which provides stability for learning footstrap use and planing in moderate winds.

Q: Which JP Australia board for learning to windsurf?
A: The JP Super Ride in 135L–160L offers the stability and early planing that makes learning far more enjoyable.

Q: Are JP Australia boards vacuum or hand-laminated?
A: Premium JP boards use vacuum sandwich construction. Entry boards use polyethylene skin for durability.

Q: Does Surf Store stock JP Australia spare fins?
A: Yes — we stock US Box, Tuttle Box, and Deep Tuttle fins compatible with the JP range.

name: Gaastra Windsurf Sails & Kites 2026

description_html:
About Gaastra

Gaastra is a Dutch water sports brand with roots stretching back to 1897 when Klaas Gaastra started making traditional sailing sails. The modern Gaastra brand — under the Boards & More umbrella alongside Duotone and Fanatic — produces windsurf sails, kites, harnesses, and accessories that balance race-proven technology with accessible pricing for club and recreational riders.

Gaastra's GA-Kites sub-brand has established itself in the foiling and light-wind kite market, with models like the Spark and ONE offering excellent glide and upwind performance for wing foiling and speed kiting enthusiasts.

The Gaastra Range

The Gaastra windsurf lineup is headed by the Cosmic — a precision freerace sail — and the Matrix, which is an all-round sail for club racing and recreational windsurfing. The Boost is the entry-level option that provides consistent power for learning to plane. GA-Kites include the Pure for beginner kiters and the MAX for experienced riders pushing light-wind limits.

Why Buy Gaastra at Surf Store

Surf Store stocks the full Gaastra 2026 range including sails in all sizes, masts, booms, and GA-Kites. We maintain one of the largest Gaastra inventories in the region and can offer complete rig packages at competitive prices. Free EU shipping applies on orders over €99.

Expert Advice

Gaastra sails are an excellent value proposition for windsurfers who want reliable, well-engineered gear without paying the premium of top-tier race brands. The Matrix is our most recommended Gaastra model for recreational club riders.

Q: Are Gaastra sails suitable for beginners?
A: Yes — the Boost series is explicitly designed for progression, offering smooth power delivery and a wide wind range.

Q: What's the difference between GA-Kites and Gaastra kites?
A: GA-Kites is the kite-specific sub-brand under the Gaastra umbrella, focused on foiling and light-wind performance.

Q: Does Surf Store carry Gaastra harnesses?
A: Yes — we stock the full GA harness line for windsurf and kite including seat and waist models.

name: Nobile Kiteboards & Foils 2026

description_html:
About Nobile

Nobile is a Polish kiteboard manufacturer that has earned a loyal following through exceptional build quality and innovative shapes. Founded in Puck, Poland — one of Europe's premier kiteboarding destinations — Nobile has the advantage of developing and testing their boards in real-world kite conditions on the Baltic Sea. The brand's flagship models are hand-laminated with quality wood cores and careful attention to deck pad placement and insert geometry.

Nobile's kiteboards are distributed across Europe and carried by specialty kite dealers who appreciate the brand's quality-per-price positioning. The NHP and 50Fifty series are particularly respected in the freestyle community for their consistent pop and reliable flex pattern.

The Nobile Range

The NHP (Nobile High Performance) is the brand's pro freestyle board — stiff, poppy, and shaped for precise landings. The 50Fifty Evolution is a balanced all-rounder that performs well in waves and flat water alike. The NHP WMN is shaped specifically for women riders, with a softer flex and shorter length. Nobile also produces a foil board lineup and IFS binding systems with modular adjustment.

Why Buy Nobile at Surf Store

Surf Store stocks Nobile kiteboards, foil kits, fins, bags, and the IFS binding system. We can advise on sizing based on your weight and riding style, and have first-hand experience with the NHP and 50Fifty range at local kite spots.

Expert Advice

Nobile's boards are a smart choice for intermediate to advanced riders who want quality construction at a lower price than premium brands. The NHP Carbon is our top recommendation for riders prioritising freestyle progression.

Q: What size Nobile board for an 80kg rider?
A: We recommend the NHP in 138cm or 142cm for an 80kg freerider. For freestyle, size down 2–4cm.

Q: Are Nobile IFS bindings adjustable?
A: Yes — Nobile's IFS system allows stance width, angle, and binding position adjustment without tools.

Q: Does Surf Store stock Nobile foils?
A: We stock select Nobile foil components. Contact us for current availability.

name: ION Water Wetsuits & Harnesses 2026
meta_description: ION Water wetsuits, harnesses & accessories 2026. Germany's #1 water sports brand. Free EU shipping €99+. Shop now.
description_html:
About ION Water

ION Water is the water sports division of ION, a German outdoor brand founded in 1993. ION Water produces wetsuits, harnesses, impact vests, boots, gloves, hoods, rashguards, and accessories for kitesurfers, windsurfers, wing foilers, and SUP paddlers. The brand is particularly celebrated for its wetsuit technology — offering thermal lining systems, panelled back-zip and front-zip designs, and a size range that covers from children to XL adults.

ION's manufacturing is certified to OEKO-TEX® standards and the brand has committed to using Yulex® natural rubber in their premium wetsuit range, reducing CO₂ emissions versus conventional neoprene by up to 80%.

The ION Water Range

ION wetsuits span from the entry-level Base series to the premium Seek Amp — their thickest and most insulating suit for cold-water sessions. The Amaze series is designed for women riders with an anatomically adjusted cut, pre-bent knees, and a higher back panel for comfort on foil boards. ION harnesses include the waist and seat designs for kite and windsurf use, with the Riot Curv being the most popular model across disciplines.

Why Buy ION at Surf Store

Surf Store carries the largest ION Water inventory in Slovenia, stocking wetsuits from 2mm summer suits to 6/5mm winter models with hood. Our staff can advise on sizing (ION uses European sizing with model-specific charts) and help you select the right thermal system for your target water temperature.

Expert Advice

The most common mistake when buying a wetsuit is sizing down too aggressively. We recommend fitting an ION wetsuit in-store or consulting our size guides — a suit that's too tight in the shoulders will exhaust you within minutes.

Q: Which ION wetsuit for Mediterranean summer use?
A: A 3/2mm like the ION Element or Base suits water at 18–22°C. Go 2mm for peak summer in warm climates.

Q: Do ION wetsuits run true to size?
A: ION uses European sizing. Tall riders may need to size up for length. Our team can advise based on your measurements.

Q: Does Surf Store repair ION wetsuits?
A: We stock ION wetsuit repair kits and neoprene glue. For major damage, we can advise on warranty options.

description_html:
Duotone Kites 2026 — The Full Range

Duotone's 2026 kite collection spans every riding style from wave riding to big air freestyle to foiling. Each model is refined through input from the Duotone World Tour team and tested extensively before release, ensuring that performance claims translate directly to the water.

Choosing the Right Duotone Kite

The Evo SLS is Duotone's evergreen all-arounder — responsive, stable, and equally at home in light-wind cruising as in powered-up freeriding. The Rebel D/LAB is the choice of experienced riders who want a direct, powerful feel in waves or powered-up sessions. The Dice SLS is built for unhooked freestyle riders who want maximum pop and hangtime.

For foiling, the Echo provides smooth, consistent power with excellent upwind angle. The Juice is ideal for light-wind days when other kites struggle to pull through. Entry-level riders should look at the Evo standard — proven reliable and easy to fly across all wind ranges.

Why Buy Duotone Kites at Surf Store

We stock sizes from 4m to 19m across the full Duotone kite range, including D/LAB and SLS performance editions. Our staff can advise on size selection based on your weight, local conditions, and riding ambitions. We offer free pre-delivery inspection and full manufacturer warranty on all Duotone kites.

Expert Advice

The single most important factor in kite selection is matching the size to your local wind range. Our team can advise on which single kite, quiver, or foil-specific model best suits surf-store.com's customer locations across Europe.

Q: What size Duotone kite for 80kg in 15–25 knots?
A: A 9m or 10m will cover this range for most riders. For freeriding, lean 10m; for performance, 9m SLS.

Q: Can I buy a Duotone kite without a bar?
A: Yes — kites are sold separately. We recommend purchasing a Duotone Click Bar for optimal compatibility.

Q: Are 2026 Duotone kites compatible with 2024 bars?
A: Yes — Duotone maintains consistent bar compatibility across model years.

name: Duotone Kite Bars
meta_title: Duotone Click Bar 2026 — Kite Control Systems
meta_description: Duotone Click Bar and Trust Bar 2026. Industry-leading safety, instant one-click release. Free EU shipping €99+. Shop now.
meta_keywords: duotone click bar,duotone kite bar 2026,duotone trust bar
description_html:
Duotone Kite Bars 2026

Duotone's control bar system is one of the most refined in kiteboarding. The Click Bar has been the market leader for over a decade, offering a reliable one-click safety release that depower in a single pull regardless of load on the bar. For 2026, Duotone has updated the Click Bar's chicken loop grip and depower cleat for even smoother operation in gloves.

Click Bar vs Trust Bar

The Click Bar is the standard recommendation for freeriders and beginners — a 4-line system with intuitive safety and a proven track record. The Trust Bar is the 5-line variant, offering a dedicated kite-depowering fifth line for wave riders and advanced riders who want precision trim in powered conditions. Both bars are fully compatible with the entire 2026 Duotone kite range.

Why Buy Duotone Bars at Surf Store

We stock the Click Bar and Trust Bar in all line length options (19m, 22m, 24m) including the Quad Control system for four-line use. Our team can advise on the right line length for your riding style and help with bar setup, line attachment, and chicken loop choice.

Expert Advice

Line length affects power delivery significantly. Longer lines (24m) give more depower range and are preferred for lighter winds. Shorter lines (19m) are used by wave riders who want less kite movement above them in shore break.

Q: What bar length is best for a beginner?
A: A 42–44cm bar is standard for most riders. The Click Bar comes in 42cm and 50cm options — choose based on wingspan.

Q: Does the Duotone Click Bar work with non-Duotone kites?
A: Technically yes, but we recommend brand-matched bars for warranty and safety reasons.

Q: Can I replace just the lines on my Click Bar?
A: Yes — Duotone sells replacement line sets for the Click Bar. We stock them in-store.

name: Duotone Kiteboards

description_html:
Duotone Kiteboards 2026

Duotone's kiteboard range spans performance twin-tips, surf strapless boards, and foil boards — all designed with the same precision that defines their kite technology. For 2026, Duotone has updated core construction on several models, introducing stiffer wood cores for more pop and refined rocker lines for better upwind tracking.

Choosing a Duotone Kiteboard

The Jaime SLS is Duotone's all-round freestyle board — poppy, precise, and liked by riders at every level above beginner. The Select SLS is the freeride option, wider and more forgiving with strong early-planing characteristics. For wave riding, the Whip D/LAB is a directional board designed for strapless surf-style riding. The Gonzales is the entry-level twin-tip offering consistent pop and easy edge-to-edge transitions.

Why Buy Duotone Boards at Surf Store

We stock Duotone kiteboards from 132cm to 147cm across the range, including D/LAB and SLS editions. Our team can advise on board sizing based on your weight, wind range, and riding style. Package deals combining board, pads and straps are available on request.

Expert Advice

For most freeriders, a 138–142cm board at 75–80kg is the ideal starting point. Go shorter for tricks, longer for light wind or heavier riders.

Q: What board size for an 85kg beginner?
A: The Duotone Select SLS in 144cm gives excellent planing, forgiveness, and confidence for learning.

Q: Are Duotone pads and straps sold separately?
A: Yes — we stock the full Duotone pad and strap range including Vario, Comfort, and Team models.

Q: Does Surf Store stock Duotone foil boards?
A: Yes — we carry the Duotone Soar and selected foil board shapes for kite foiling.

name: Duotone Windsurf Sails

description_html:
Duotone Windsurf Sails 2026

Duotone produces one of the most complete windsurf sail ranges in the sport — covering slalom racing, wave riding, foiling, and all-round freeride use. The 2026 collection builds on the brand's SLS (Stiff Lite Skin) carbon construction and D/LAB technology to deliver class-leading power, light weight, and precise trim control.

The Sail Range

The Super_Star SLS is Duotone's PWA-proven slalom race sail, optimised for maximum speed in flat-water conditions. The Warp_Foil is designed for windsurf foiling — narrow head, manageable power, and early liftoff characteristics. The Tonic and Idol handle wave sailing with lightweight construction and a short luff for manoeuvrability in breaking surf. The Super_Hero is the entry-level range — wide wind range, self-supporting mast sleeve, and forgiving power.

Why Buy Duotone Sails at Surf Store

Surf Store stocks the full Duotone windsurf sail lineup from 3.4m wave sails to 9.8m race sails. We can advise on size selection, mast bend curve compatibility, and boom length for your height. Complete rig packages are available at discounted bundle prices.

Expert Advice

Sail size selection depends on your weight, local wind average, and board volume. As a guide: at 80kg in 15–25 knots freeride, a 6.5–7.0m sail on a 100L–130L board is a strong starting point. Our team can advise further based on your location.

Q: What mast do I need for a Duotone sail?
A: Duotone recommends their own SDM or RDM masts matched to the sail's published IMCS rating.

Q: Can I use one Duotone mast for multiple sails?
A: Yes — if the sails share the same luff length and IMCS rating, one mast can be used across models.

Q: Does Surf Store offer complete Duotone rig packages?
A: Yes — contact us for bundle pricing on sail, mast, boom, and extension combinations.

name: Duotone Windsurf Masts
meta_description: Duotone SDM and RDM windsurf masts 2026. Race-spec carbon construction. Free EU shipping €99+. Shop now at Surf Store.
meta_keywords: duotone windsurf mast,duotone sdm mast,duotone rdm mast
description_html:
Duotone Windsurf Masts 2026

A windsurf sail's performance is only as good as the mast it's rigged on. Duotone produces their masts to the exact bend curves tested by their PWA race team — ensuring that a Duotone sail on a Duotone mast performs exactly as the designers intended. Both SDM (Standard Diameter Mast) and RDM (Reduced Diameter Mast) variants are available across carbon percentages from 60% entry to 100% D/LAB carbon.

SDM vs RDM

SDM masts are the traditional choice for freeride and race sails in moderate to strong wind. They provide a stiffer feel and are required by many high-performance race sails. RDM masts are narrower in diameter and more flexible — preferred for wave sails and short-luff designs where the mast needs to fit inside a small mast pocket and absorb impact during wipeouts.

Why Buy Duotone Masts at Surf Store

We stock Duotone masts from 340cm to 520cm in both SDM and RDM variants. Our team can verify mast compatibility with your existing sails and advise on the optimal carbon percentage for your budget and riding frequency.

Expert Advice

The minimum recommended carbon percentage for serious racing is 75%. For recreational freeride use, a 60% carbon mast is a cost-effective choice that still provides good sail profile. Higher carbon = lighter weight and faster power delivery.

Q: What IMCS rating do I need for a 7.0m Duotone sail?
A: Duotone publishes recommended IMCS ratings per sail model. Our team can confirm the exact spec for your sail.

Q: Are Duotone RDM masts 2-piece or 1-piece?
A: Duotone masts are 2-piece (top and bottom) for travel convenience. Extension required separately.

Q: How do I know if my mast is worn out?
A: Check for cracks around the joint and lateral flex — if the mast feels noticeably softer than new, consider replacement.

name: Duotone Windsurf Booms
meta_description: Duotone windsurf booms 2026. Adjustable carbon & aluminium booms for all sail sizes. Free EU shipping. Shop now.
description_html:
Duotone Windsurf Booms 2026

A windsurf boom directly affects your ability to control sail trim, transmit power to the board, and maintain comfortable stance over a session. Duotone booms are engineered to the same standards as their sails — with precise front-end jaw geometry, lightweight arm construction, and reliable cleat systems that hold boom length in the heaviest wind load.

Boom Materials and Sizes

Duotone offers aluminium and 100% carbon boom options. Aluminium booms are durable, cost-effective, and ideal for recreational riders who prioritise reliability over weight. Carbon booms are significantly lighter, reducing arm fatigue during extended sessions and improving overall balance. Sizes span 140–230cm in standard and crossover adjustment ranges.

Why Buy Duotone Booms at Surf Store

We stock Duotone booms in all sizes and materials. Our staff can advise on the right boom length for your sail size range and riding style, and can demonstrate correct boom height and harness line position in store.

Expert Advice

Boom height is one of the most overlooked elements in windsurf setup. A boom that's too low causes excessive back pain; too high limits power. As a guide: boom height should be between chin and shoulder height when standing on the board.

Q: What boom length for a 6.5m–8.0m sail range?
A: A 160–200cm adjustable boom covers this range comfortably. Duotone's XO Boom fits most freeride and race sails.

Q: How do I prevent a boom from sliding on the mast?
A: Ensure the boom front end clamp is the correct diameter for your mast (SDM or RDM) and check the clamp pads for wear annually.

Q: Does Surf Store service windsurf booms?
A: We stock replacement front end clamp parts and cleat inserts for Duotone booms.

name: Duotone Wings 2026
meta_title: Duotone Wings 2026 — Unit Echo Slick & More
meta_description: All Duotone wings 2026 — Unit D/LAB, Echo, Slick & Downwinder. Expert wing foil advice. Free EU shipping. Shop now.

description_html:
Duotone Wings 2026 — The Full Range

Duotone produces one of the most complete wing lineups in wing foiling — covering everything from beginner-friendly inflatable wings to high-performance D/LAB racing units. Every wing in the 2026 range is the product of collaboration with the Duotone wing team, who test in diverse conditions from flat water speed riding to ocean downwinders.

Choosing a Duotone Wing

The Unit D/LAB is Duotone's flagship — a stiff, high-aspect wing for intermediate to advanced riders who want speed, upwind angle, and powerful pumping. The Echo is the all-around recommendation: easy to relaunch, excellent for learning, and strong upwind in a wide wind range. The Slick is the beginner-friendly option with more neutral handling. For downwind sessions, Duotone's Downwinder Air SUP inflatable combines perfectly with any wing in the range.

Why Buy Duotone Wings at Surf Store

We stock Duotone wings from 2.5m to 8.0m across all models. Our team has personal wing foiling experience and can advise on size, handle configuration, and which Duotone foil to pair with your wing for the best progression.

Expert Advice

Wing size selection depends primarily on rider weight and local wind average. At 75kg in 15–20 knots, a 5.0–5.5m wing is the sweet spot for most sessions. Going smaller increases speed and control; larger improves light-wind performance.

Q: What Duotone wing for an 80kg beginner?
A: The Duotone Echo 5.5m–6.0m in a stable beginner colour is ideal for learning with room to progress.

Q: How long does a Duotone wing last?
A: With proper care (rinse, dry, store out of sunlight), a Duotone wing will last 300+ hours. Bladder replacement is the most common maintenance.

Q: Does Surf Store stock replacement Duotone wing bladders?
A: Yes — we carry leading edge and strut bladders for current Duotone wing models.

description_html:
Cabrinha Kites 2026 — The Complete Range

Cabrinha's kite lineup for 2026 continues the brand's tradition of offering distinct, purpose-built models for every riding style — from the world's most popular beginner kite to dedicated wave and freestyle platforms. Each model is designed in Maui and tested in the consistent trade winds and ocean surf that define Cabrinha's development environment.

The Cabrinha Kite Range

The Switchblade remains the cornerstone of the range — its delta-hybrid design offers a wide depower range, excellent relaunch, and comfortable bar pressure that works for beginners and experienced riders alike. The Drifter is Cabrinha's wave-specific design, built to drift downwind and relaunch efficiently in surf. The FX is the freestyle kite: direct, stiff, and explosive for unhooked tricks.

The Moto is the entry-level all-rounder, designed for beginners who want a stable, confidence-inspiring first kite. The Moto X is the performance version — adding boost and hangtime for riders progressing beyond basics. For foiling, the Contra offers extraordinary upwind angle and light-wind performance.

Why Buy Cabrinha Kites at Surf Store

Surf Store stocks the full Cabrinha 2026 kite range from 4m to 19m, with the Switchblade available in all standard sizes and the Drifter in sizes optimised for wave riding. We can arrange demo sessions in conjunction with local kite schools and provide full post-purchase support.

Expert Advice

For riders new to Cabrinha, the Switchblade in a 10m or 12m is the most recommended starting point — versatile enough for learning and strong enough to stay in your quiver as skills develop.

Q: What's the difference between the Cabrinha Switchblade and Moto?
A: The Switchblade is performance-oriented with delta-hybrid geometry; the Moto is more beginner-friendly with wider depower and easier relaunch.

Q: Can I use Cabrinha kites with a Duotone bar?
A: We do not recommend cross-brand bar use. Cabrinha's Unify bar is optimised for their kite geometry and safety systems.

Q: Does Surf Store offer kite demos?
A: Contact us — we can arrange demo sessions with Cabrinha kites at select locations in Slovenia.

NeilPryde Windsurf Sails 2026

NeilPryde has produced some of the most successful windsurf racing sails of all time — with multiple PWA World Championship wins across slalom and formula disciplines. The 2026 collection builds on X-Ply monofilm laminates, precise batten tuning, and production quality that delivers consistent sail profile over hundreds of hours of use.

The NeilPryde Sail Range

The RS:Flight is NeilPryde's premium race sail — produced in collaboration with their PWA riders for maximum speed in slalom conditions. The Atlas Pro is the mid-range freerace option: race-inspired shape at a more accessible price point, ideal for club racers. The Fusion is the all-round freeride sail — wide wind range, easy rigging, and consistent power delivery. The Wizard is the entry-level sail for beginners transitioning from school boards to planning.

Why Buy NeilPryde Sails at Surf Store

We stock NeilPryde sails from 3.3m to 9.6m with matching masts and boom recommendations. Our windsurf team can advise on size for your weight, local wind range, and board. Complete rig packages with NeilPryde masts and booms are available at bundle pricing.

Expert Advice

NeilPryde sails are manufactured to tight tolerances — ensuring the sail shape you see in reviews is replicated in your production model. We recommend pairing NeilPryde sails with NeilPryde masts for optimal profile accuracy.

Q: What mast for a NeilPryde Atlas Pro 7.0m?
A: NeilPryde publishes specific mast recommendations per sail model including luff length and IMCS rating. Our team can confirm.

Q: Are NeilPryde sails good for beginners?
A: The Wizard series is explicitly designed for learning — wide batten spacing and a forgiving power curve make it an excellent first sail.

Q: Does Surf Store stock NeilPryde race accessories?

name: ION Wetsuits 2026
meta_description: ION Water wetsuits 2026 — 2mm to 6/5mm. Men, women & kids. Expert fit advice. Free EU shipping €99+. Shop now.

description_html:
ION Wetsuits 2026 — The Full Range

ION's 2026 wetsuit collection is the most comprehensive in the brand's history — spanning 2mm summer suits to 6/5mm cold-water models with attached hood, covering men, women, and children. ION uses SuperFlex neoprene with preformed knee panels, liquid-seal wrist and ankle cuffs, and both back-zip and chest-zip entry options across the range.

Choosing an ION Wetsuit

The Base series is ION's entry-level range — quality construction at accessible prices, ideal for casual water sports use in 15–22°C water. The Element series adds stretch neoprene panels and upgraded seam construction for improved durability and warmth. The Seek range is the mid-premium tier — front-zip designs with advanced thermal lining options. The Amaze is the women-specific line across all thicknesses, with an anatomically adjusted cut and shorter leg length.

At the top of the range, the Seek Amp in 5/4mm and 6/5mm delivers the maximum warmth ION offers — suitable for winter sessions in water down to 8°C.

Why Buy ION Wetsuits at Surf Store

Surf Store carries the largest ION wetsuit range in Slovenia — over 50 models in stock across thicknesses, entry styles, and gender sizes. Our team can advise on size (ION uses European sizing with height/weight charts) and help you find the right model for your target water temperature and sport.

Expert Advice

The right wetsuit thickness depends on water temperature, not air temperature. We recommend our wetsuit temperature guide: 2mm for 20°C+, 3/2mm for 16–20°C, 4/3mm for 12–16°C, 5/4mm for 8–12°C, and 6/5mm with hood below 8°C.

Q: Should I buy a back-zip or chest-zip ION wetsuit?
A: Chest-zip wetsuits are warmer and better fitting but harder to get on. Back-zip suits are easier for beginners. Our team can advise based on your experience level.

Q: How do I care for an ION wetsuit?
A: Rinse in fresh water after each use, dry inside-out in shade, and store flat or on a wide hanger. Avoid UV exposure and heat.

Q: What age are ION kids wetsuits sized for?
A: ION kids suits are available from 4 years (92cm) to 14 years (164cm) in 3/2mm and 4/3mm thicknesses.

description_html:
About Duotone Apparel

Duotone Apparel is the clothing and accessories division of Duotone, one of the world's leading water sports brands. Built on the same engineering standards that define Duotone's kites and sails, the apparel range covers everything riders need beyond the board — from technical harnesses and impact vests to boardshorts, rashguards, and lifestyle wear designed for life around the water.

Every Duotone apparel product is developed alongside the brand's professional team riders, ensuring that fit, durability, and freedom of movement meet the demands of real sessions in real conditions. Materials are selected for UV resistance, quick-dry performance, and comfort during extended time on the water.

The Duotone Apparel Range

Duotone's technical apparel includes the Apex harness line for kitesurfing — featuring carbon composite shells, memory foam padding, and the signature Duotone spreader bar system. Impact vests provide CE-certified protection for foiling and big-air sessions. The boardshort collection balances stretch fabric with reinforced seams for performance in and out of the water.

For cooler conditions, Duotone offers neoprene tops, spray jackets, and thermal base layers that integrate with their wetsuit range. Lifestyle pieces including caps, hoodies, and t-shirts carry the Duotone aesthetic for everyday wear.

Why Buy Duotone Apparel at Surf Store

Surf Store stocks the full Duotone apparel range with sizing from XS to XXL. Our team can advise on harness fit — one of the most personal equipment choices in kitesurfing — and help you match impact protection to your riding style. Free EU shipping on orders over €99.

Expert Advice

A well-fitted harness transforms your riding. We recommend trying harnesses in-store or consulting our detailed size guide before purchasing. The right harness should sit on your hips without riding up during jumps.

Q: What harness type for kitesurfing beginners?
A: A seat harness offers the most support for learning. Transition to a waist harness once you can consistently edge and ride upwind.

Q: Are Duotone impact vests CE certified?
A: Yes — Duotone impact vests meet CE EN 1621 standards for impact protection, suitable for foiling and freestyle riding.

Q: Does Surf Store carry Duotone women's apparel?
A: Yes — we stock women-specific harnesses, impact vests, boardshorts, and rashguards in the Duotone range.

name: Duotone Foiling & Electric

description_html:
About Duotone Foiling & Electric

Duotone Foiling & Electric represents the brand's commitment to the fastest-growing segment in water sports. As hydrofoiling has transformed kitesurfing, windsurfing, and wing foiling, Duotone has developed a comprehensive foil ecosystem — from carbon front wings and aluminium masts to dedicated foil boards and electric foil systems that let riders fly above the water without wind.

Duotone's foil development is led by their World Tour athletes, including pioneers who have pushed foil racing speeds beyond 30 knots. The result is a foil range that delivers genuine performance gains at every level — from first-time foilers to competitive racers.

The Duotone Foil Range

The Spirit Carve front wing series covers high-aspect racing through to surf-oriented low-aspect designs. The Glide foil mast comes in aluminium and carbon, in lengths from 60cm to 95cm. Fuselages, shims, and stabiliser wings allow precise tuning of foil behaviour. The Pace foil board lineup offers dedicated shapes for kite foiling, wing foiling, and windsurf foiling — each with optimised volume, rail shape, and foot strap positioning.

For electric foiling, Duotone offers complete eFoil packages that combine a motorised mast unit with a purpose-built board, allowing riders to foil on flat water without any wind at all.

Why Buy Duotone Foils at Surf Store

Surf Store stocks the full Duotone foil component range — front wings, masts, fuselages, stabilisers, and boards. Our team can advise on wing area for your weight and discipline, mast length for your local conditions, and board volume for stable foiling progression.

Expert Advice

Start with a larger front wing (1500–2000cm²) and shorter mast (70cm) to build confidence. As skills develop, move to smaller wings for speed and longer masts for cleaner carving above chop.

Q: Are Duotone foil components interchangeable across disciplines?
A: Yes — the Duotone foil system uses a modular design. You can swap front wings and masts between kite, wing, and windsurf boards with the same mast box.

Q: What mast length for a beginner foiler?
A: 70cm gives you room to learn without excessive height. Move to 85cm+ once comfortable with flight control.

Q: Does Surf Store assemble foil packages?
A: Yes — we can build complete foil setups matched to your discipline, weight, and budget. Contact us for a quote.

name: Duotone Foilwing
meta_title: Duotone Foilwing 2026 — Wings & Wing Foil Gear
meta_description: Duotone foilwing collection 2026 — inflatable wings, wing handles and wing foil packages. Find your perfect wing size.
description_html:
About Duotone Foilwing

Duotone Foilwing is the brand's dedicated wing foiling sub-brand, focused entirely on inflatable wings and the accessories that support wing foil riding. Wing foiling is the fastest-growing water sport in the world, and Duotone has been at the forefront since the sport's earliest days — developing wings that are lighter, stiffer, and more controllable than anything available a few seasons ago.

The Duotone Foilwing team includes athletes like Balz Muller and Maxime Chabloz, whose competitive feedback directly shapes handle placement, canopy tension, and window positioning across the range.

The Duotone Foilwing Range

The Unit is Duotone's performance wing — available in standard and D/LAB construction, offering a stiff canopy, rigid handles, and high-aspect outline for maximum upwind angle and speed. The Echo is the versatile all-rounder — forgiving enough for intermediates yet fast enough for experienced riders to enjoy in every session. The Slick is the beginner wing: lightweight, easy to handle, and designed to build confidence quickly.

Wing sizes span from 2.5m for high-wind speed sessions to 7.0m+ for light-wind cruising. Duotone also produces wing-specific accessories including wrist leashes, wing bags, and repair kits.

Why Buy Duotone Foilwing at Surf Store

Surf Store carries the complete Duotone Foilwing range and can pair wings with Duotone foils and boards for a complete setup. Our team wing foils regularly and can advise on size, model, and handle configuration based on your weight and local conditions.

Expert Advice

For most riders at 75–85kg, a 5.0m wing covers the widest wind range (12–25 knots). Add a 4.0m for strong wind days and a 6.0m for light wind to build a complete quiver.

Q: What Duotone wing for a complete beginner?
A: The Duotone Echo in 5.5m or 6.0m. It's forgiving, relaunches easily, and has enough power for light-wind learning.

Q: How do Duotone wings compare to Cabrinha wings?
A: Duotone wings tend to be stiffer with more direct power delivery. Cabrinha wings focus on drift and ease of use. Both are excellent — the choice depends on riding style.

Q: Can I use a Duotone wing without a foil?
A: Yes — wing foiling isn't mandatory. Many riders enjoy wing surfing on SUP boards or skateboards with a wing for propulsion.

name: Fanatic SUP

description_html:
About Fanatic SUP

Fanatic is one of the original stand-up paddleboarding brands in Europe, with over 40 years of board-building heritage rooted in windsurfing and water sports engineering. Part of the Boards & More group alongside Duotone and ION, Fanatic SUP delivers the same production quality and shape precision that has made the brand a fixture on the PWA World Tour — applied to inflatable and hardboard SUP designs for every paddler.

Fanatic's iSUP range uses multi-layer drop-stitch construction with reinforced PVC rails, achieving stiffness levels that rival entry-level hardboards. Their composite hardboard SUP range is built using vacuum sandwich technology for competitive weight and durability.

The Fanatic SUP Range

The Ray Air is Fanatic's best-selling touring iSUP — narrow enough for efficient tracking, stable enough for all-day paddling. The Fly Air is the all-round family board, wide and forgiving at 10'4" to 10'8". The Diamond Air is designed specifically for women and lighter paddlers with adjusted volume and deck pad sizing. For racing, the Falcon Air offers a needle nose and narrow outline for competitive speed on flat water.

Fanatic hardboard SUPs include surf-oriented shapes, touring racers, and the Bee — a compact city board designed for transport and storage in small spaces.

Why Buy Fanatic SUP at Surf Store

Surf Store stocks the complete Fanatic iSUP and hardboard range, including paddles, pumps, bags, and accessories. We can advise on board width and volume for your weight, intended use, and storage requirements. All iSUPs ship in their carry bag for easy delivery across the EU.

Expert Advice

For most adult paddlers (65–90kg), a 10'4" to 10'8" all-round board at 32–34" width offers the best balance of stability and manoeuvrability. Go wider for yoga or fishing; narrower for touring speed.

Q: What's the difference between Fanatic and Duotone SUP?
A: Fanatic is the board brand (shapes, construction), while Duotone focuses on kite, windsurf, and wing equipment. Both are under the Boards & More umbrella.

Q: Can Fanatic iSUPs handle ocean conditions?
A: Yes — the reinforced construction handles coastal chop well. The Ray Air is particularly suited to touring in open water.

Q: Does Surf Store stock Fanatic SUP paddles?
A: Yes — we carry the full Fanatic paddle range from aluminium entry models to carbon race paddles.

name: Fanatic Windsurfing
meta_title: Fanatic Windsurfing Boards 2026 — Wave, Freeride & Race
meta_description: Fanatic windsurfing boards 2026 — wave, freeride, freestyle and race boards. Award-winning shapes for all wind conditions.
description_html:
About Fanatic Windsurfing

Fanatic has been building windsurfing boards since the 1980s and remains one of the most respected names in the sport. Under the Boards & More umbrella, Fanatic windsurfing boards are shaped by a team that includes multiple PWA World Champions and tested in conditions from the flat waters of Lake Garda to the open ocean swells of Maui. Every board is manufactured in the brand's own production facilities using either wood sandwich, carbon composite, or full carbon D/LAB construction.

Fanatic's windsurfing range is particularly strong in wave and freewave shapes — the Grip and Quad series have won more wave events than any other board brand in recent years.

The Fanatic Windsurfing Range

The Blast is the entry-level freeride board — wide, stable, and quick to plane for intermediate riders building confidence. The Gecko is the all-round beginner board with a centreboard option for light-wind learning. The Falcon is the slalom race board — narrow, fast, and designed for flat-water speed. The Grip and Quad series are wave boards built for critical turns in powerful surf. The Stingray is the freewave crossover — capable in waves but equally fun on flat water.

Why Buy Fanatic Windsurfing at Surf Store

Surf Store carries Fanatic windsurfing boards across all categories. We can advise on volume, width, and construction level for your weight, local conditions, and experience. We pair Fanatic boards with Duotone or Gaastra sails and masts for complete windsurf setups.

Expert Advice

Volume selection is the most critical decision in windsurf board choice. A good rule: your body weight in kg + 30–50L for freeride, +10–20L for wave. Our team can fine-tune this for your local wind and water conditions.

Q: Which Fanatic board for a beginner?
A: The Fanatic Gecko in 148L or 156L gives maximum stability for learning. Transition to the Blast once you can plane consistently.

Q: Are Fanatic boards compatible with all fin systems?
A: Fanatic boards use US Box, Tuttle Box, or slot-box fin systems depending on the model. Our team can confirm compatibility.

Q: Does Surf Store stock Fanatic wave boards?
A: Yes — we carry the Grip and Quad wave board series in multiple volumes and constructions.

name: Fanatic X
meta_title: Fanatic X 2026 — Premium Windsurfing & SUP Collection
meta_description: Fanatic X high-performance boards and accessories 2026. Top-spec windsurfing and SUP equipment for serious riders.
description_html:
About Fanatic X

Fanatic X is Fanatic's premium product line — a curated collection of high-performance boards and equipment that represent the pinnacle of the brand's engineering. Where the standard Fanatic range covers all levels and budgets, Fanatic X focuses exclusively on advanced riders who demand the lightest weight, most responsive shapes, and highest-grade materials available.

Every Fanatic X product uses the brand's top-tier construction methods: full carbon layup, vacuum sandwich technology, and hand-finished details that reduce weight without compromising durability. These are the boards that Fanatic's professional team rides in competition.

The Fanatic X Range

The Fanatic X lineup includes premium versions of the brand's most popular shapes — the Blast X for freeride, the Falcon X for slalom racing, and the Grip X for wave riding. Each X model sheds significant weight compared to the standard version while adding responsiveness through stiffer layup schedules and refined rocker lines. SUP models in the X range include the Ray X touring board with full carbon rails and the Strike X surf SUP.

Why Buy Fanatic X at Surf Store

Fanatic X boards are produced in limited quantities and not available at every dealer. Surf Store stocks selected X models and can special-order specific sizes. Our team can advise on whether the X upgrade is worth the investment for your riding frequency and level.

Expert Advice

The X upgrade is most noticeable for riders who sail 50+ days per year. The weight savings compound over a long session — lighter boards accelerate faster, plane earlier, and respond more precisely to input. For casual riders, the standard range offers excellent value.

Q: How much lighter is a Fanatic X board vs standard?
A: Typically 1–2kg lighter depending on the model. On a wave board, that difference is immediately noticeable in aerial manoeuvrability.

Q: Is the Fanatic X range covered by the same warranty?
A: Yes — all Fanatic boards carry the standard manufacturer warranty regardless of construction level.

Q: Can I demo a Fanatic X board before buying?
A: Contact us — we can arrange demo sessions at select locations depending on model availability.

description_html:
About ION Bike

ION Bike is the mountain biking division of ION, the German outdoor brand known for premium water sports equipment. ION entered the mountain bike market with the same philosophy that built their water sports reputation — technical products designed by riders, manufactured to the highest safety standards, and backed by real-world testing on trails across Europe.

ION Bike focuses on protection and riding apparel for trail, enduro, and downhill mountain biking. Their helmets, pads, and body armour are CE-certified and tested beyond minimum requirements, while their riding clothing combines MTB-specific features with materials that withstand the demands of aggressive riding.

The ION Bike Range

ION Bike helmets include the Traze series for trail riding — lightweight, well-ventilated, with MIPS liner technology for rotational impact protection. The Scrub full-face helmet targets enduro and downhill riders who need maximum coverage without excessive weight. Knee pads range from lightweight sleeve-style trail pads to heavy-duty D3O-equipped enduro protection. Back protectors use multi-layer foam construction with ventilation channels for all-day comfort.

ION's riding apparel includes trail shorts, jerseys, gloves, and rain jackets designed for freedom of movement on the bike while protecting against UV, abrasion, and weather.

Why Buy ION Bike at Surf Store

Surf Store carries the ION Bike protection range for riders who enjoy both water sports and mountain biking. Our team can advise on sizing and protection levels for your riding style — whether you need lightweight trail pads for cross-country or full enduro armour for bike park sessions.

Expert Advice

Protection fit is critical. Knee pads should stay in place during pedalling without restricting movement. We recommend trying pads while seated in a cycling position — they should grip above and below the knee without sliding.

Q: Are ION Bike helmets MIPS certified?
A: Selected ION helmets include MIPS or equivalent rotational protection systems. Check individual model specifications.

Q: What knee pads for trail riding?
A: The ION K-Pact is our most recommended trail knee pad — lightweight, breathable, and secure enough to stay in place on technical descents.

Q: Does Surf Store carry ION Bike clothing?
A: Yes — we stock ION trail shorts, jerseys, gloves, and outerwear alongside the protection range.

name: ION Water
meta_title: ION Water 2026 — Wetsuits, Harnesses & Water Sports Gear
meta_description: ION Water wetsuits, harnesses, impact vests and accessories 2026. Kitesurfing, windsurfing and SUP gear from ION.

description_html:
About ION Water

ION Water is the water sports division of ION, Germany's leading action sports brand. Since 1993, ION has built a reputation for technically excellent wetsuits, harnesses, impact vests, and accessories that serve kitesurfers, windsurfers, wing foilers, and SUP paddlers across Europe and beyond. ION Water products are developed in Munich and tested in conditions from the cold North Sea to the warm Mediterranean — ensuring every product performs across the full range of European water sports environments.

ION's wetsuit technology includes proprietary Plasma neoprene with thermal lining, Hot_Stuff fleece insulation for cold-water use, and both back-zip and chest-zip entry systems designed for fast water entry and minimal flushing.

The ION Water Range

ION wetsuits span from 2mm summer shorties to 6/5mm hooded winter suits. The Element series is the mid-range workhorse — offering strong thermal performance and durability at a competitive price. The Seek series adds premium features including front-zip entry, smooth-skin chest panels, and upgraded wrist seals. The Amaze series is designed specifically for women riders.

ION harnesses include the Riot Curv — a waist harness with a pre-shaped carbon composite back panel that distributes load evenly during powered riding. Impact vests, boots, gloves, hoods, and drysuits complete the range.

Why Buy ION Water at Surf Store

Surf Store maintains one of the largest ION Water inventories in Slovenia, with wetsuits, harnesses, and accessories available to try in store. Our team uses ION gear daily and can advise on thickness, entry style, and size for your body type and local water temperature.

Expert Advice

A wetsuit that fits properly should feel snug everywhere with no air pockets — especially around the lower back and armpits. If water enters through loose seams, the suit loses most of its insulating ability. We offer in-store fitting to ensure the right size.

Q: Which ION harness for kitesurfing?
A: The ION Riot Curv is our top recommendation — excellent load distribution, comfortable padding, and a secure fit that prevents ride-up during jumps.

Q: How often should I replace my wetsuit?
A: With proper care, an ION wetsuit lasts 2–4 seasons. Replace when seams start leaking consistently or neoprene loses its stretch.

Q: Does ION make drysuits?
A: Yes — ION produces drysuits for extreme cold-water use, typically for winter kitesurfing in northern Europe.

name: Point7
meta_title: Point-7 Windsurf Sails 2026 — AC-K, Spy & MC
meta_description: Point-7 windsurf sails 2026 — AC-K, Spy, MC and Salt series. Racing-DNA sails for freerace and freestyle riders.
description_html:
About Point-7

Point-7 is an Italian windsurf sail brand founded by Andrea Cucchi — a professional windsurfer, sail designer, and PWA competitor who applies his racing experience directly to every sail in the range. Unlike large corporate brands, Point-7 operates with a focused approach: fewer models, each obsessively refined through on-water testing by the founder himself. The result is a sail range with genuine racing DNA at prices that undercut the premium brands by 20–30%.

Point-7 sails are manufactured using high-quality X-Ply and monofilm materials with attention to panel layout, batten pre-tension, and mast pocket fit. The brand has built a loyal following among club racers and freeride enthusiasts who value performance-per-euro above brand prestige.

The Point-7 Sail Range

The AC-K is Point-7's flagship racing sail — designed for maximum speed in slalom and freerace conditions. The AC-F is the foil-optimised version with reduced power and a shorter luff for windsurf foiling. The Spy is the all-round freeride sail — easy to rig, wide wind range, and forgiving for intermediate riders. The Salt is the wave sail — compact, light, and built for manoeuvrability in breaking surf. The MC is the freestyle sail designed for stability and pop during aerial tricks.

Why Buy Point-7 at Surf Store

Surf Store is an authorised Point-7 dealer carrying the full sail range with complete size availability. We can advise on mast compatibility, sail size for your weight and wind range, and rig setup for your specific board. Point-7 sails offer exceptional racing performance at a realistic price point.

Expert Advice

Point-7's AC-K consistently performs at PWA-level speeds in independent testing. For riders who race at club level or want the fastest possible sail for recreational blasting, the AC-K is one of the best value propositions in windsurfing.

Q: What mast for Point-7 sails?
A: Point-7 publishes mast recommendations per sail. Their sails work with most IMCS-rated SDM and RDM masts. Our team can verify compatibility.

Q: Are Point-7 sails good for beginners?
A: The Spy is accessible for intermediate riders. True beginners may prefer a sail with a wider trim range from brands like Gaastra or NeilPryde.

Q: Does Surf Store stock Point-7 accessories?
A: We carry select Point-7 accessories including sail bags and mast protectors alongside the full sail range.

name: Tabou
meta_title: Tabou Windsurfing Boards 2026 — Wave, Freeride & Slalom
meta_description: Tabou windsurfing boards 2026 — wave, freeride, slalom and freestyle. French-engineered boards built for performance.
description_html:
About Tabou

Tabou is a French windsurfing board brand with a heritage stretching back to the 1980s. Now part of the Gaastra / Boards & More distribution network, Tabou boards are shaped in France and manufactured to precise specifications that prioritise smooth planing, comfortable stance, and reliable performance in European wind and water conditions. Tabou's design philosophy favours accessible performance — boards that make good windsurfers better rather than demanding expert-level skills to enjoy.

Tabou boards are distributed across Europe by specialist windsurf dealers who value the brand's consistent quality and competitive pricing. The Rocket freeride series and 3S wave boards are particularly popular in the Mediterranean and Atlantic windsurfing communities.

The Tabou Range

The Rocket is Tabou's flagship freeride board — wide enough for early planing, balanced enough for comfortable cruising, and fast enough for recreational racing. The 3S (Sun, Surf, Slalom) is the versatile crossover that handles everything from small waves to flat-water blasting. The Da Bomb is the pure wave board — compact, loose, and designed for critical turns in powerful surf. The Manta targets freestyle riders with a flat rocker and poppy flex pattern for aerial tricks.

Why Buy Tabou at Surf Store

Surf Store carries the Tabou windsurfing range alongside the Gaastra sail collection — a natural pairing since both brands share distribution. We can build complete windsurf setups with Tabou boards and Gaastra sails at competitive package prices.

Expert Advice

Tabou boards are an excellent choice for intermediate windsurfers who want reliable, well-made equipment without the premium price of top-tier brands. The Rocket in 135L–155L is our most recommended Tabou model for recreational freeride sailors.

Q: What's the difference between Tabou and Fanatic boards?
A: Fanatic targets advanced to pro riders with cutting-edge construction. Tabou focuses on accessible performance at a lower price point — excellent for club and recreational sailing.

Q: Are Tabou boards compatible with standard fins?
A: Yes — Tabou boards use standard US Box or Tuttle Box fin systems compatible with aftermarket fins from all major brands.

Q: Does Surf Store pair Tabou boards with Gaastra sails?
A: Yes — we regularly build Tabou + Gaastra packages. Contact us for bundle pricing on complete windsurf setups.

name: Tricktionary
meta_description: Shop Tricktionary kiteboarding equipment 2026. Kites, kite bars, pads, straps and accessories for all skill levels.
description_html:
About Tricktionary

Tricktionary started as the definitive kiteboarding trick encyclopedia — a comprehensive visual guide to every kiteboarding move, from basic jumps to advanced handle-pass tricks. The brand has since expanded into producing kiteboarding accessories and equipment designed with the same educational, rider-first approach that made their trick guides a staple in every kite school worldwide.

Tricktionary's products are designed by experienced kitesurfers who understand what riders actually need on the water. The brand focuses on quality accessories, board components, and educational materials that complement any kite setup regardless of brand.

The Tricktionary Range

Tricktionary produces high-quality pads and straps for twin-tip kiteboards — offering aftermarket upgrades that improve comfort, grip, and adjustability over stock bindings. Their board bags and travel accessories are designed for practical kite travel. The brand's Tricktionary book series remains the most comprehensive kiteboarding trick reference available, with step-by-step photo sequences and coaching tips for hundreds of moves.

Selected Tricktionary accessories include leashes, harness hooks, bar components, and kite repair materials — practical items that every kitesurfer needs in their gear bag.

Why Buy Tricktionary at Surf Store

Surf Store stocks Tricktionary accessories alongside our main kite brands. Whether you need replacement pads and straps for your existing board, a quality board bag for travel, or the Tricktionary book to accelerate your progression, our team can help you find the right product.

Expert Advice

Upgrading your pads and straps is one of the cheapest ways to improve comfort and control on your existing kiteboard. Tricktionary pads offer better cushioning and grip than most stock bindings.

Q: Do Tricktionary pads fit all kiteboards?
A: Tricktionary pads use a standard insert pattern that fits most twin-tip boards. Check insert spacing before ordering — our team can verify compatibility.

Q: Is the Tricktionary book suitable for beginners?
A: Yes — it covers everything from basic body dragging to advanced freestyle. It's used by kite schools worldwide as a teaching reference.

Q: Does Surf Store stock the latest Tricktionary edition?
A: Yes — we carry the current Tricktionary edition in stock. Contact us for availability.

name: WOO Sports
meta_description: Woo Sports kiteboarding accessories 2026 — Woo tracking device, pads, straps and kite gear. Measure your jumps.
meta_keywords: woo sports,woo kite sensor,woo jump tracker
description_html:
About WOO Sports

WOO Sports is best known for the WOO — the world's most popular kiteboarding jump tracker. The small sensor mounts on your board and uses GPS and accelerometer data to measure jump height, airtime, hang time, and G-force in real time. With a global leaderboard and a passionate community, WOO has turned every session into a competition — against yourself, your friends, or riders worldwide.

Beyond the tracker, WOO Sports has expanded into kiteboarding accessories that share the brand's tech-forward, rider-community approach. Every WOO product is designed to enhance the riding experience through data, connectivity, and quality engineering.

The WOO Sports Range

The WOO 4.0 is the latest generation of the jump tracker — featuring improved GPS accuracy, Bluetooth 5 connectivity, and a rechargeable battery lasting 8+ hours. The accompanying WOO app displays session data, jump history, personal records, and global rankings. The WOO Mount attaches securely to any twin-tip board using a standard insert pattern, and the WOO Leash provides a safety backup during crashes.

WOO also produces boardshorts, caps, and lifestyle accessories that carry the brand's distinctive aesthetic for the kite beach.

Why Buy WOO at Surf Store

Surf Store stocks the WOO tracker, mounts, leashes, and accessories. Our team can help with mount installation and app setup to ensure you're tracking from your first session. The WOO is an excellent gift for any kitesurfer who wants to measure their progress objectively.

Expert Advice

The WOO tracker is most useful for riders who are actively working on jump height and big air progression. If you're already jumping consistently and want motivation to push higher, the WOO provides the data and community to keep you progressing.

Q: Does the WOO work with any kiteboard?
A: Yes — the WOO mount fits any twin-tip board with standard insert holes. A strap mount option is available for boards without inserts.

Q: How accurate is the WOO jump measurement?
A: The WOO 4.0 uses GPS + accelerometer fusion for accuracy within 0.5m on jump height. It's the industry standard for kite jump tracking.

Q: Can I use the WOO for wakeboarding or snowkiting?
A: The WOO is designed for kiteboarding. It works on snow with a kite, but accuracy may vary in non-standard conditions.
